stream_a.title: EU countries to vote on CBAM carbon price deduction rules in September
stream_a.summary: EU member states will vote in September on rules defining which foreign CO2 prices importers can deduct from their Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) fees, a European Commission official said.
stream_a.topic: EU CBAM — Policy & Implementation 歐盟CBAM政策

stream_a.title: Euro Markets: EUAs up 0.4% on the week as market settles in for rangebound trading ahead of reforms
stream_a.summary: European carbon prices posted a 0.4% weekly gain, unwinding the previous week's 0.4% decline as EUAs continued to travel sideways in a narrow channel ahead of mid-July's EU ETS reform package, while UKAs dropped 1.4% on the week amid ebbing confidence in a rapid linking agreement.

stream_a.title: Wind energy industry urges EU ETS overhaul to prioritise industrial electrification
stream_a.summary: The European Commission should use its upcoming revision of the EU Emissions Trading System (ETS) to redirect billions of euros in carbon market revenues towards industrial electrification, trade association WindEurope has said.

stream_a.title: Five European Commission departments object to draft EU ETS reform
stream_a.summary: Five European Commission departments have issued negative opinions on a draft reform of the EU’s Emissions Trading System (EU ETS), EU officials told Carbon Pulse.

stream_a.title: MENA Roundup: Gulf countries build up voluntary carbon markets at home
stream_a.summary: Middle Eastern and North African (MENA) countries last month offered carrots, sticks, and capacity support to accelerate domestic and regional carbon market development.
stream_a.topic: Voluntary Carbon Market (VCM) 自願性碳市場

stream_b.title: 綠領人才缺工23萬人超夯！五成以上不限年資、薪資中位數達 57K
stream_b.summary: 畢業季綠領工作夯！平均每月近3萬職缺創10年新高，AI綠領需求5年翻倍，企業更面臨23萬人才缺口。環境部4日攜手104人力銀行發布《2026上半年綠領人才就業趨勢報告》指出，在淨零轉型、AI快速發展及國際永續規範推動下，綠領人才已成為企業爭相延攬的新目標，薪資也優於一般職缺。

stream_b.title: UK engineered carbon removal credits could top 850 mln by 2050 -report
stream_b.summary: Total UK-based engineered carbon removal credit supply could reach up to 852 million by 2050 under a high-growth scenario, according to modelling commissioned by the British government.

stream_b.title: India proposes carbon intensity targets for iron, steel under ETS
stream_b.summary: India's environment ministry has proposed carbon intensity targets for iron and steel producers under its Carbon Credit Trading Scheme, the largest sector yet brought under the compliance mechanism.
